hero.subtitle:
Static HTML for SEO. SPA for speed. AI-ready by default.
No React. No config files. No learning curve.
why.title: Why docmd?
why.desc: Production-grade documentation infrastructure. Comprehensive features with clean developer experience.
bento.layouts.title: Write Complex Layouts in Markdown
bento.layouts.desc: Callouts, cards, tabs, and more. Native container syntax for complex layouts — no HTML required.
bento.themes.title: Themes
bento.themes.desc: Built-in Light & Dark modes. Futuristic gradients or clean corporate looks.
bento.search.title: Search That Works Everywhere
bento.search.desc: Instant fuzzy search with zero API keys. No cloud. Works offline. 100% private.
bento.plugins.title: Plugins
bento.plugins.desc: All 6 core plugins included by default. Zero config required.
bento.versioning.title: Versioning
bento.versioning.desc: Native multi-version support. Switch between legacy, stable, and experimental docs seamlessly.
bento.ai.title: Built for the AI Era
bento.ai.desc: Semantic containers provide high-fidelity signals for AI agents. Every site ships with llms.txt and llms-full.txt context streams.
bento.fast.title: Fast Without the Framework Tax
bento.fast.desc: Zero-reload navigation with standalone HTML files. < 20kb client JS. Lighthouse 100.
bento.changelog.title: Changelogs
bento.changelog.desc: Beautiful timeline component for your release notes.
bento.i18n.title: Native i18n
bento.i18n.desc: First-class multi-language support with locale-first URLs, per-locale search, and translated UI strings.
bento.deploy.title: One-Command Deploy
bento.deploy.desc: Generate production-ready Docker, Nginx, and Caddy configs tailored to your project. Config-aware — no generic templates.
plugins.title: Plugin Ecosystem
plugins.desc: Everything you need, built in. Optional add-ons when you want more.
plugins.search.name: Search
plugins.search.desc: Offline full-text fuzzy search. Zero API keys, 100% private.
plugins.seo.name: SEO
plugins.seo.desc: Meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter cards, and AI bot controls.
plugins.sitemap.name: Sitemap
plugins.sitemap.desc: Automatic sitemap.xml generation with priority and frequency.
plugins.analytics.name: Analytics
plugins.analytics.desc: Google Analytics v4 with zero-config injection.
plugins.pwa.name: PWA
plugins.pwa.desc: Progressive Web App support with offline caching.
plugins.llms.name: LLMs
plugins.llms.desc: Auto-generate llms.txt and llms-full.txt for AI context.
plugins.mermaid.name: Mermaid
plugins.mermaid.desc: Native interactive diagrams with dark/light theme support.
plugins.threads.name: Threads
plugins.threads.desc: Inline discussion comments stored in your markdown files.
plugins.math.name: Math (KaTeX)
plugins.math.desc: Beautiful math equations with KaTeX rendering. Inline and block support.
cta.title: Ready to write better docs?
cta.desc: Join the developers building fast, beautiful documentation with docmd.
sponsors.title: Community Sponsors
footer.tagline:
The zero-config documentation engine.

Open Source under MIT License.
© 2026 docmd.io
bento.layouts.cards.desc: They can feature overviews, summaries, or linking to other sections.
bento.layouts.tabs.desc: Organise content into multiple tabbed sections.
